title: Missing module docstrings in package __init__.py files
description:
Several package __init__.py files lack module-level docstrings:

- `src/lichen/dashboard/__init__.py`: Web dashboard package
- `src/lichen/senml/__init__.py`: SenML codec package  
- `src/lichen/slip/__init__.py`: SLIP framing package

Other packages (crypto, link, announce, rpl, loadng, coap, schc, sim, radio) have proper module docstrings.
